required_tables.commit: Validation rules for scratch memory allocations
required_tables.name: scratch_memory

validation_queries.description: Check that all scratch memory allocations have non-NULL IDs
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in the id column of scratch_memory for scratch memory
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scratch_memory WHERE category = 'rocm_scratch_memory' AND id IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Check that all scratch memory allocations have valid sizes (non-NULL and > 0)
validation_queries.error_message: Found scratch memory allocations where size is NULL or 0
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scratch_memory WHERE operation = 'ALLOC' AND (size IS NULL OR size = 0);

validation_queries.description: Check that all scratch memory allocations have valid start and end times
validation_queries.error_message: Found scratch memory allocations where start or end is NULL
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scratch_memory WHERE start IS NULL OR end IS NULL OR start = 0 OR end = 0;

validation_queries.description: Check that all scratch memory allocations have start timestamp strictly less than end timestamp
validation_queries.error_message: Found scratch memory allocations where start is greater than or equal to end
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scratch_memory WHERE start >= end;

required_tables.commit: Validation rules for scratch memory string entries
required_tables.name: rocpd_string

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_scratch_memory' string is present in the table
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_scratch_memory' string not found in the table rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocm_scratch_memory%';
